name: Tucson Lemon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2 Grease and flour a 12-cup Bundt cake pan or a 10x 4-inch tube pan.
3 In a large bowl, beat sugar and margarine on medium speed until light and fluffy.
4 Add eggs, one at a time, and mix until well combined.
5 In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt.
6 Alternately add the dry ingredients and buttermilk to the sugar mixture, mixing until just blended.
7 Stir in poppy seeds, lemon peel, and lemon juice.
8 Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 50-55 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9 Allow the cake to cool for 20 minutes before removing it from the pan.
10 Prepare the Lemon Glaze by mixing powdered sugar, margarine/butter, remaining lemon peel, and lemon juice until well blended.
11 Pour about two-thirds of the glaze over the top of the warm cake.
12 Serve on a heatproof plate, allowing the glaze to set.
